## Parley v0.3.0 — Recording replay & negotiation coaching

### Upload & replay
- Upload a recording and review it on a timeline. Guided flow: transcribe → preview & trim → diarize speakers → name them → analyze.
- Audio-based speaker diarization (local voice model + clustering) tells speakers apart by voice, not just text.
- Instant, non-destructive trim: cut intro / post-meeting chatter immediately — no re-encode, no re-analysis.

### Caching — re-uploading the same recording is instant
- Transcription, speaker clusters, the speaker names you assign, and analysis findings are all cached, so re-testing the same file restores who-is-who and the analysis without redoing it.

### Analysis
- One Analyze menu on the player: re-analyze all / timeline only / action items only.
- Timeline shows the active eval template, with a "re-analyze" hint when you switch templates.
- Persistent self-profile (name / role / company / background) injected into every prompt so the AI keeps "us" vs "them" straight.

### Other
- Native Diagnostics menu: view logs + clear caches (transcription / diarization / analysis).
- Ogg-Opus decode fix and assorted AI prompt + reliability improvements.
